name: token_safety_quick
description: Pre-trade rug check <1s. SAFE/CAUTION/DANGER verdict + risk score (0-100) + 3 factors. Checks: liquidity, holders, contract. Pairs with: token_alpha_report (deep dive), whale_tracker_base. Input: symbol or address. Cheapest safety gate ($0.01). Keywords: rug check, token safety, pre-trade, risk score, contract analysis.
deliverable: "JSON: { verdict: SAFE|CAUTION|DANGER, riskScore: 0-100, factors: [{type, severity, detail}] }"
